===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:Wallace JN.png|thumb|250px|Wallace in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
Wallace reappeared in ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', now sporting his {{pkmn|Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire}} outfit and having returned to serving as the {{ci|Sootopolis}} Gym Leader. During a Pokémon Contest Spectacular in [[Lilycove City]], where Wallace's niece [[Lisia]] was competing, he encountered Ash and [[Goh]] as they were going to watch [[Chloe]]'s performance, but Wallace, having heard of Ash's success in the [[World Coronation Series]], demanded to have a {{pkmn|battle}} with him, which he accepted. At first, Ash had trouble remembering who Wallace was, much to Wallace's irritation, but eventually he remembered him once Wallace mentioned the Wallace Cup. The battle between them ended in Ash's victory, for which Wallace rewarded him with a {{badge|Rain}} and his scarf, wanting to make sure that Ash wouldn't forget this encounter with him.
